title: Xmas Mahjong Trio Solitaire
description: Embark on a festive adventure with Xmas Mahjong Trio Solitaire. Arrange Mahjong tiles in a horizontal stack of 9, strategically making trios disappear for extra cheer. Be cautious of overflowing stacks, as it signals the end of the game. Unwrap the joy of Xmas in this simple yet engaging holiday experience!
instructions: Navigate with Mouse or Touch Use your mouse or touch gestures to select tiles in the stack Match Three Tiles Seek out or unlock sets of three similar tiles for a match Shuffle for Easier Matches Utilize the board shuffle option to rearrange tiles for
